name: Complete checkout and confirm the order persists

steps.text: Add the "Desk Lamp" twice and the "Coffee Mug" once.
Proceed to checkout and place the order.
Revisit the order's own link as a fresh visit.

criteria.text: Placing the order succeeds: the user reaches an order-confirmation page for a real, newly created order — not an error page and not a dead end.
On the confirmation, the figures reconcile: the Subtotal plus the Tax equals the Total shown.
When the order's own link is revisited, the same order is still retrievable and shows the same items and the same Total as when it was placed.
